displayTitle: Omnibus: Clone Wars Volume 3 – The Republic Falls
synopsis: Collects Republic #81-83 along with issues from the prior period, including (not listed in reading order) Star Wars: Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special (2005) One-Shot, Star Wars: Obsession (2004) #1-5, Star Wars: Republic (2002) #69-77 & 81-83, and, Star Wars/Conan – Free Comic Book Day 2006 Special (2006) One-Shot
title: Star Wars Omnibus: Clone Wars Volume 3 – The Republic Falls
